name: Amber's Chicken Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 1 (8 oz) package cream cheese, cut-up, softened
1 (4.5 oz) can chopped green chiles, drained
2 (8 oz) packages Monterey Jack cheese (I use less and also substitute mozzarella, depending on what I have)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and sauté for about 5 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in green chiles and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add cream cheese and chicken to the skillet; stir constantly until the cream cheese melts.
5. Spoon 2-3 tablespoons of the chicken mixture into the center of each tortilla.
6. Roll up the tortillas tightly and place seam side down in a greased 9x13 baking dish.
7. Sprinkle with Monterey Jack cheese and drizzle with whipping cream.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes, or until golden brown on top.
NOTE: If freezing enchiladas, do not add cream cheese; instead, use additional Monterey Jack and/or mozzarella cheese.
